title: BeanBlock
description: BeanBlock is perfect for players who love authentic Minecraft roleplay but also want enhanced performance and immersive details.
body:
![BeanBlock Title Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b061f2f1962e68fcf49db13a6b7436a0a87dda14.png)

### About the modpack

BeanBlock is a carefully curated modpack designed to enhance the classic Minecraft experience with vanilla-like improvements tailored for roleplaying enthusiasts. It combines performance optimization, immersive audio and visuals, and practical features to create a realistic and engaging gameplay environment.  

### Features

- **Roleplaying Features**: ***Simple Voice Chat*** enables seamless communication, while mods like ***Presence Footsteps*** and ***3D Skin Layers*** add realism to your character and environment.
- **Immersive Atmosphere**: **Shaders** provide stunning visuals, while ***AmbientSounds*** and ***Sound Physics Remastered*** enhance the experience with lifelike audio.  
- **Vanilla Feel with Enhancements**: Mods such as ***Shulker Box Tooltip***, ***SleepCycle***, and ***Falling Leaves*** add subtle details without straying from the classic Minecraft aesthetic.  
- **Streamlined Navigation**: With ***Xaero's Maps*** navigating worlds becomes effortless.
- **Quality of Life Improvements**: ***Dynamic FPS***, ***Dark Loading Screen*** and ***Zoomify*** refine minor yet essential aspects of the game.
- **Improved Performance**: Mods like ***Sodium*** ***Lithium*** ***ImmediatelyFast*** and ***FerriteCore*** ensure smooth framerates, even in expansive worlds.

**BeanBlock** is perfect for players who love authentic Minecraft roleplay but also want enhanced performance and immersive details.

The modpack was designed as part of a project by [TheNiceWolf](https://www.twitch.tv/thenicewolf), but open to everyone.

### Notes

*Simple Voice Chat* requires additional setup on servers, if you want to play with others using it.
